title: PolarSpleef
description: Spleef brought to Cobblemon with exciting features!
body:
Simple spleef functionality added to Cobblemon.
There is currently no infrastructure, but if there is any interest in this mod, I will add it later on. Currently, there is only functionality related to some of the pokéballs when it hits certain blocks.

As of version 1.2, spleef only works with Snow Blocks, and that is the only block that causes the special behavior. The following poké balls have custom behavior:

## Platform Hit Effects
- Pokeball
  - Removes the snow block it hits
- Great Ball
  - Causes a tiny explosion and gives huge knockback when it hits a snow block
- Ultra Ball
  - Causes a bigger explosion upon hitting snow blocks


## Player Hit Effects
- Heavy Ball
  - Applies slowness to your opponent!
- Dive ball
  - Forces your opponent into swimming mode for 1 second
- Ancient Jet Ball
  - Sends your opponent flying
- Dusk Ball
  - Gives your opponent darkness
- Quick Ball
  - Gives your opponent speed, making it harder to parkour around in the arena
- Wing Ball
  - Makes your opponent levitate, possibly helping them up another layer or fall to their death!

## Misc balls
- Master Ball
  - Spawns Ultra Balls with custom behavior at its location while it is flying through the air
- Heal Ball
  - Spawns a tiny platform 1 second after being thrown

If you have any questions or would like to suggest new features, feel free to reach out to me on Discord.
